creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

there hasn't been an update on ports/112202 [1] for quite a while. I'm
trying to find out what the state of this is.

Scot, are you still interested in becoming the maintainer of
security/vscan? Can you send a followup with a final patch that should be
committed? Or should this PR be closed instead?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112202
